questionHtml:
Three quantities used to describe a light wave are

          I.   frequency
          II.  wavelength
          III. speed.

Which quantities increase when the light wave passes from water to air?

A. I and II only

B. I and III only

C. II and III only

D. I, II and III

meta.title: Three quantities used to describe a light wave are I. frequency II. wavelength III. speed. Which quantities increase when the light wave passes from water to air? A. I and II only
